title: Social Media Lead
description:
At Picsart, we bring the wonder of creativity to the world—and make it easy.

As our hands-on Social Media Lead, you'll be at the forefront of making Picsart a standout brand on social media. This isn't just a strategic role; you'll be deeply involved in the day-to-day execution of campaigns aimed at attracting solopreneurs and SMBs, all while keeping our content consistently engaging, trend-forward, and visually stunning. You will be actively managing social media initiatives, directly contributing to content creation, and guiding a team of social media producers to implement strategies for significant growth across our key channels, including YouTube, Instagram, and Pinterest. If you're not just observing but actively immersed in pop culture, design, and social media trends, and possess a highly creative and action-oriented mindset, this role is for you.

How You'll Make An Impact


 * Develop and execute a bold, innovative social media strategy that positions Picsart as the go-to platform for solopreneurs and SMBs.
 * Oversee and actively participate in content creation, storytelling, and campaign execution across YouTube, Instagram, and Pinterest to directly drive engagement and follower growth.
 * Stay ahead of social media trends, pop culture moments, and design innovations to create content that resonates with our audience.
 * Manage and mentor a team of social producers, fostering creativity and collaboration.
 * Partner with marketing, creative, and product teams to align social media with broader brand goals.
 * Use analytics to track performance, uncover insights, and refine strategies for growth and engagement.
 * Actively engage with Picsart’s community to build relationships and amplify user-generated content.
 * Experiment with new formats, tools, and platforms to keep Picsart’s social media presence fresh and exciting.
   
   

What You'll Bring


 * Someone who not only strategizes but also possesses the practical skills and drive for hands-on execution.
 * 5+ years of experience in social media strategy and content creation with a strong track record of directly growing and managing social media accounts, with a focus on tangible results on YouTube, Instagram, and Pinterest.
 * Knowledge of how to analyze data and apply the learnings for better results
 * Experience managing and leading a team, coupled with a collaborative leadership style and a willingness to lead by example through direct involvement.
 * A creative powerhouse who thrives on brainstorming and executing bold ideas.
 * Passionate about pop culture, social media, and design trends.
 * Strong organizational and project management skills.
   
   

Good To Have


 * Bonus: Experience creating or working with content for solopreneurs or SMBs.
 * Background in visual storytelling or design.
 * Experience working in a fast-paced, high-growth tech or creative environment.
   
   

What we seek and value most in our candidates

Professionalism in both soft and hard skills; motivation to grow, learn and share, positive attitude, flexibility, transparency, ownership and the most important - passion and commitment.

Picsart is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We also consider qualified applicants with criminal histories, consistent with applicable federal, state and local law. We are committed to providing reasonable accommodation to employees who have protected disabilities consistent with local law.

Picsart, Inc. is an E-Verify Employer in the US. Please click here for the E-Verify Poster in English or Spanish. For information regarding your Right To Work, please click here for English or Spanish.

For Applicants Based in California - California Job Applicant Privacy Notice (https://rb.gy/lqu5mv)

About Us

Picsart is the world’s largest digital creation platform and a top 20 most downloaded app. Every month, the Picsart community creates, remixes, and shares billions of visual stories using the company’s powerful and easy-to-use editing tools. Picsart has amassed one of the largest open-source content collections in the world, including free-to-edit photos, stickers, backgrounds, templates, and more. Picsart is available in 30 languages for free and as a subscription on iOS, Android, Windows devices and on the Web. Headquartered in Miami, with offices around the world, Picsart is backed by SoftBank, Sequoia Capital, DCM Ventures, Insight Partners, and others. Download the app or visit picsart.com for more information.

title: Digital Marketing Manager - B2B
description:
What we do. Electric Car Leasing




Why we do it. Greener. Fairer. Future.







We are launching our EV (electric vehicle) leasing business in Germany and need an outstanding B2B Marketing Manager to help build it from the ground up. We have rapidly scaled our proposition in the UK to over 30k vehicles on fleet and £300m ARR in just a few years. What’s more, we’re growing faster than ever. Our mission is to rapidly accelerate the EV transition whilst providing the best possible service to our customers.




Our ambition is to build the biggest EV platform in Germany as rapidly as possible. You may know our sister company, Octopus Energy, who are already one of the fastest growing green energy providers in Germany with over 1m customers.




We need a highly motivated self-starter, where you will build, own, and drive initiatives from the ground up. You’ll be one of the first key hires – a talented and versatile B2B Marketing Manager to work directly with our General Manager. This isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to be an integral part of our foundational team in Germany, shape our future, and truly own your work. 




You'll be given a high degree of autonomy and responsibility, making this an ideal role for someone who is proactive, resourceful, and eager to leave their mark.






What you'll do
 * Develop the go-to-market strategy for our proposition in Germany, aligning with growth milestones and focusing on B2B customer acquisition and conversion.  
 * Implement marketing activity across all channels. We run all our marketing activity in house so you’ll need to be confident being hands on with campaign management in the channels, including in digital acquisition channels such as search, CRM, and social media. 
 * Collaborate with the UK marketing team, learning from what the UK team has already tested. Localise relevant UK marketing creative and copy in line with brand guidelines, making sure it is appropriate and effective for the German market
 * Seek out new growth opportunities, finding ways to test them, learn rapidly and scale what works. Run A/B testing to continuously improve campaign performance. 
 * Manage and optimise website content and journeys including sales and campaignlanding pages and content
 * Use customer insights and data to hone segmentation and targeting across all channels.  
 * Manage budget and forecasting. Own and manage the marketing budget in line with a CPA target, including taking opportunities to spend more if we can, or reduce spend if we need to
 * Collaborate with the wider UK team to put marketing infrastructure in place to enable growth, including website CMS, email marketing platform (Orrto), and web analytics (GA4). 
 * Optimise the marketing and sales funnel to drive continual growth in MQLs with a focus on conversion rate optimisation, lead quality and CAC, using data driven insights to continually improve performance
 * Report on commercial performance to senior stakeholders across the business on an ongoing basis
   




What you'll need
 * Proven growth marketing experience (minimum of 5 years) in B2B marketing in high-growth scale up businesses. 
 * Commercially driven: A track record of driving commercial outcomes through digital marketing activity. 
   

 * Strong analytical skills and experience with data analysis tools. 
 * A data-driven approach: an analytical mindset and strong grasp of performance metrics is crucial. 
 * Passion for customer experience and insight-lead marketing
 * Adaptability: we work at a very fast pace so we need you to be collaborative, proactive, and open to ripping up the rulebook and doing things differently
 * Excellent communication skills: you need to be comfortable writing copy from scratch, writing clear prompts for AI tools and briefing content writers. 
 * Stakeholder management: You’ll need to be confident in communicating our strategy to senior stakeholders and managing competing priorities from across the business. 
 * Growth mindset: with a focus on building positive feedback loops to continuously improve marketing campaigns and team performance 
 * Ability to ruthlessly prioritise and think critically - there’s always a lot going on and loads of cool things we could do. You need to be able to decipher which tasks we should do. 
 * CRM experience: a bonus but not essential, providing you’re digitally savvy and numerically confident. 
 * A natural curiosity and a passion for staying up-to-date with the latest trends and technologies in marketing
 * Fluent/native German speaker and business proficient in English
   




💚 Why else you'll love it here
 * 💰 Wondering what the salary for this role is? Just ask us! On a call with one of our recruiters it's something we always cover as we genuinely want to match your experience with the correct salary. The reason why we don't advertise is because we honestly have a degree of flexibility and would never want salary to be a reason why someone doesn't apply to Octopus - what's more important to us is finding the right octofit!
   
   

 * 🎉 Octopus Energy Group is a unique culture. An organisation where people learn, decide, and build quicker. Where people work with autonomy, alongside a wide range of amazing co-owners, on projects that break new ground. We want your hard work to be rewarded with perks you actually care about! 🎁 Visit our perks hub - Octopus Employee Benefits
   
   

 * 🏆 Octopus Electric Vehicles, part of the Octopus Energy Group, won the Sunday Times best company to work for in 2024. We were named 6th out of the top 100 start-ups to work for by Tempo in 2025 and on Glassdoor we were voted 50 best places to work in 2022. Our Group CEO, Greg has recorded a podcast about our culture and how we empower our people. We’ve also been placed in the top 10 companies for senior leadership
   
   

 * P.s. 🐶 just to let you know, we are dog friendly company so you may see our 4 legged friends in the offices - feel free to bring yours! Rest assured though, we've taken lots of precautions for those who have allergies
   





About us




The electric revolution has arrived - and from 2035 you’ll no longer be able to buy a new petrol or diesel car in the UK. 




We’re building a whole new way for drivers to join the electric charge and not only learn about and shop for their EV online, but experience a 'lease for life' through an industry changing customer experience. This is the chance to join one of the UK’s most exciting start-ups – making it easy for individuals and businesses to go electric by getting their car, charger and energy all in one cracking deal.




Octopus Electric Vehicles launched in 2018 to make it seamless to switch to cleaner, greener driving. Our mission is to drive sustainable change, decarbonise the planet and provide our customers with fair pricing and a fantastic experience. 




We're an Octopus Energy company—an innovative new energy supplier. We are part of the Octopus Energy Group, which seeks to improve the lives of millions of people by transforming the industries we operate in. The Octopus Group incorporates Octopus Energy, Octopus Healthcare, Octopus Investments, Octopus Property, Octopus Ventures and Octopus Labs.




Please note we use AI to help us assess applications fairly and objectively.




If this sounds like you then we'd love to hear from you.




Are you ready for a career with us? We want to ensure you have all the tools and environment you need to unleash your potential. Need any specific accommodations? Whether you require specific accommodations or have a unique preference, let us know, and we'll do what we can to customise your interview process for comfort and maximum magic!




Studies have shown that some groups of people, like women, are less likely to apply to a role unless they meet 100% of the job requirements. Whoever you are, if you like one of our jobs, we encourage you to apply as you might just be the candidate we hire. Across Octopus, we're looking for genuinely decent people who are honest and empathetic. Our people are our strongest asset and the unique skills and perspectives people bring to the team are the driving force of our success. As an equal opportunity employer, we do not discriminate on the basis of any protected attribute. Our commitment is to provide equal opportunities, an inclusive work environment, and fairness for everyone.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
We’re an eCommerce brand with a strong community and a fast-growing presence—especially on YouTube. Our audience isn’t just watching; they’re talking, sharing, and expecting real conversation in return. We’re looking for a Social Media Manager who thrives on connection, understands brand voice, and knows how to turn engagement into loyalty.

The Role

Apply here: https://tally.so/r/nPzGyx

This role centers on listening and responding. You’ll manage comments, DMs, mentions, and discussions across all social platforms, with special focus on YouTube. You’ll represent the brand’s tone and culture—authentic, consistent, and human—while spotting opportunities to strengthen relationships and protect our reputation online.

Responsibilities


 * Monitor, respond to, and engage with audiences across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, X, and other platforms.
 * Track community sentiment and flag emerging conversations, issues, or trends.
 * Partner with marketing and creative teams to align tone and responses with brand messaging.
 * Develop community engagement strategies to deepen brand affinity and encourage user-generated content.
 * Maintain response protocols and escalate sensitive issues when needed.
 * Analyze engagement performance and share insights for content optimization.
 * Stay updated on platform policies, emerging social trends, and competitor community practices.
   
   

Ideal Profile


 * 2–4 years experience in social media management, community management, or customer engagement—ideally within eCommerce or consumer brands.
 * Proven success managing YouTube communities.
 * Exceptional written communication and tone adaptation skills.
 * Strong grasp of digital culture and online community dynamics.
 * Comfortable using social media monitoring and analytics tools (e.g., Sprout, Hootsuite, Brandwatch, or similar).
 * Able to balance empathy, humor, and professionalism in public and private interactions.
   
   

What Success Looks Like


 * Fast, thoughtful responses that sound like us.
 * High audience satisfaction and visible community growth.
 * Early detection of potential brand risks or opportunities.
 * Data-backed insights that shape smarter social strategy.
   
   

What's on Offer?


 * Strong opportunities to progress your career
 * Fantastic work culture
 * Flexible working options

title: Online Marketing Manager
description:
Hey there! We're meetergo GmbH, a small but mighty tech company based in Cologne, Germany. We're all about creating intuitive software solutions that make life easier, especially when it comes to managing meetings and appointments. Our team is self-financed, so we prioritize quality over speed, ensuring our products are top-notch. We're looking for an Online Marketing Manager who can help us spread the word about our awesome tools. If you're someone who loves crafting creative marketing strategies and engaging with a tech-savvy audience, we want to hear from you! Join us in making the administrative side of work a breeze for everyone. Let's grow together and have fun while we're at it!


Tasks

   
   
 * Create and manage engaging content for our social media channels to boost brand awareness.
   
   
 * Develop and implement online marketing strategies to drive website traffic and generate leads.
   
   
 * Analyze and report on the performance of digital marketing campaigns using analytics tools.
   
   
 * Collaborate with the design team to create eye-catching visuals for marketing materials.
   
   
 * Keep up with trends in digital marketing and suggest innovative ways to enhance our online presence.
   
   


Requirements

   
   
 * Experience with digital marketing strategies and tools to drive online engagement.
   
   
 * Strong understanding of SEO, PPC, social media, and email marketing.
   
   
 * Excellent communication skills and the ability to create compelling content.
   
   
 * Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and make data-driven decisions.
   
   
 * Proven ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.
   
   


Benefits

   
   
 * Be part of a dynamic startup where your voice is heard, and your contributions have a direct impact.
   
   
 * Contribute to addressing the climate crisis, tackling one of the world's most pressing challenges.
   
   
 * Dive deep into sales & marketing, understanding customer needs and co-creating impactful products.
   
   
 * Enjoy flexible working hours tailored to your schedule, whether remote or in our vibrant Cologne office.
   
   
 * Shape the future of our organization as one of our early team members, with ample opportunities for growth.
   
   
 * Receive an attractive compensation package.
   
   


Join our small, innovative team at meetergo GmbH as an Online Marketing Manager. Drive exciting projects, enjoy work-life balance, and help shape our unique, self-financed software journey!

title: Digital Marketing Manager
description:
BUILD THE NEXT GENERATION OF THE INTERNET

At Impossible Cloud, we’re redefining cloud storage. As a European provider, we offer enterprise-grade, S3-compatible object storage that’s faster, more cost-efficient, and free from hyperscaler lock-ins.

Built to challenge the dominance of centralized providers, our solution delivers high-performance cloud storage with transparent pricing and real data sovereignty — all from our HQ in Hamburg.

Find out more about us here.

TL;DR: As Digital Marketing Manager, you will be responsible for planning, executing, and optimizing digital marketing campaigns across multiple channels. You will drive growth by increasing visibility, generating leads, and improving conversion rates through creative and data-driven strategies. You will work closely with product, sales, and executive teams to align marketing efforts with company goals.

What you will do:


 * Lead the Next Generation of Digital Marketing: Own and scale Impossible Cloud’s digital marketing strategy across Europe, promoting our S3-compatible, decentralized cloud platform that outperforms hyperscalers on speed, sustainability, and cost
 * Build & Empower High-Impact Marketing Programs: Design and implement campaigns, content, and digital initiatives that drive lead generation, brand awareness, and customer engagement with a hands-on, results-driven approach
 * Drive Data-Driven Growth: Utilize analytics and insights to continuously optimize campaigns, conversion funnels, and website performance, ensuring measurable impact on pipeline and customer acquisition
 * Leverage AI to Supercharge Marketing: Champion AI-powered tools and workflows to automate campaign management, optimize targeting, generate creative content, and enhance personalization across channels
 * Operationalize for Scale: Implement scalable marketing processes, workflows, analytics dashboards, and performance metrics to enable predictable growth, higher efficiency, and a strong marketing ROI
   
   
   
   
   

What you bring to the table:


 * 5+ years of experience in digital marketing, preferably in B2B SaaS, cloud, or tech companies
 * Proven expertise in marketing automation, process optimization, and AI-powered marketing tools
 * Hands-on experience running paid media, SEO/SEM, content, email, and social campaigns at scale
 * Strong analytical skills with the ability to turn data into actionable marketing strategies
 * Experience building and scaling marketing workflows, campaign pipelines, and performance tracking
 * Creative, self-starter mindset with excellent project management and communication skills
 * Professional fluency in English and German
   
   
   
   
   

What we offer:


 * Competitive salary coupled with direct engagement in your success through an enticing ESOP
 * Ideal company stage with established initial revenue and a distinctive edge in the cloud industry leading to fast growth opportunities
 * Collaboration with experienced, passionate, and supportive colleagues, leveraging cutting-edge technology in the cloud industry
 * Fantastic office situated in a trendy location with access to complimentary healthy brain food and a subsidized premium gym membership
 * Monthly collaborative meet-up weeks featuring team events
 * Submit your application (at least a complete resume) via the application form
 * We will review your application promptly and provide feedback within a few days. If your application closely matches our requirements, we will invite you to an initial meeting via Google Meet
 * As the next potential step, we will initiate further discussions via video and in person on-site with the founders
 * After a successful interview process, you can expect an offer and feedback conversation, followed by a written offer document

title: Social Media Manager (Remote)
description:
Who we are


Softr is the most intuitive no-code AI powered platform for building business apps such us internal tools and client portals, powered by your data (Softr Databases, Airtable, Hubspot, SQL, etc).


If you’re interested in being on the cutting edge of technology and advancing your career at a fast-growing, lean, impact-driven company, then read on…


Our mission is to empower billions of knowledge workers to create their own software, for their work and life.


Since our launch in 2021, over 1 million+ teams have built client portals, employee intranets, project management tools, dashboards, CRMs, inventory management systems, and other custom business apps on Softr. Global innovators like Google, Make, Clay, Hulk, MIT, and thousands of SMBs worldwide leverage Softr to build apps that solve mission-critical workflows in record time.


We’re a fully remote, distributed and diverse team of curious, ambitious, hungry and humble individuals.


Tasks


We’re looking for a creative and strategic Social Media Manager to own Softr’s social presence and grow awareness across channels like LinkedIn, X, and beyond. You’ll turn product updates, launches, and community stories into scroll-stopping content that builds our brand and drives engagement.


You’ll work closely with product marketing, design, and Head of Marketing to shape our social voice, lead creative campaigns, and help the whole team share our story more effectively online.


This role blends strategy, storytelling, and hands-on content creation — perfect for someone who loves experimenting with new formats, understands tech products & culture, and thrives in fast-paced environments.


In this role you will:


   
   
 * Own our social strategy: Plan, create, and publish content across LinkedIn and X, and explore other key channels to grow reach, engagement, and brand awareness.
   
   
 * Lead creative storytelling: Turn GTM launches, customer stories, and product updates into narrative-driven posts and campaigns that stand out in the no-code / SaaS space.
   
   
 * Engage and create conversation: Be an active voice in our social channels— respond to comments, jump into relevant industry discussions, and find ways to connect with users, builders, and partners in authentic ways.
   
   
 * Support branded creator campaigns: Work alongside our Influencer Manager to collaborate with creators and influencers to expand Softr’s reach and brand presence in new communities.
   
   
 * Collaborate across teams: Partner with product marketing, design, and community to amplify launches, events, and company milestones.
   
   
 * Support thought leadership: Help leadership and team members craft authentic, high-impact posts that reflect their voices while staying aligned with brand messaging.
   
   
 * Track and analyze performance: Measure engagement, reach, and growth to continuously improve content strategy.
   
   
 * Stay ahead of trends: Spot creative trends in social, tech, and design communities and translate them into actionable ideas for Softr’s channels.
   
   


Requirements


What you bring to the table


   
   
 * A creative thinker who knows how to make technical products feel human, visual, and engaging.
   
   
 * A witty writer who can turn even complex ideas into scroll-stopping, shareable stories.
   
   
 * You live and breathe social trends — always spotting what’s next, what’s working, and how to make it fit Softr’s voice.
   
   
 * Skilled in writing for social — short-form copy, narrative threads, and visual storytelling.
   
   
 * Comfortable creating light visuals or working with design tools (Figma, Canva, etc.) to bring ideas to life quickly.
   
   
 * Experienced in managing social accounts for a brand, startup, or personal creator presence with proven audience growth.
   
   
 * Analytical enough to use insights to shape strategy, not just post content.
   
   
 * Excited about AI, no-code, startups, and the intersection of product, design, and community.
   
   


Bonus points if you..


   
   
 * Have experience building or collaborating with branded creator/influencer campaigns.
   
   
 * Have a strong personal presence on LinkedIn, X, or similar platforms.
   
   
 * Can ideate or storyboard short-form video content (motion, animation, reels, or lo-fi video).
   
   
 * Understand how social ties into SEO, GTM launches, and broader marketing strategy.
   
   


Benefits


What’s in it for you


   
   
 * Fast-growing company and opportunity to make an impact on a large scale.
   
   
 * Competitive startup salary and equity options.
   
   
 * Fully remote and flexible work schedule.
   
   
 * High ownership, zero bureaucracy. Lean team, get things done mindset.
   
   
 * Annual company retreat and team gatherings.
   
   
 * Opportunity to build up sales motion from the ground up and have an outsized impact on the company’s trajectory.
   
   
 * Work directly with the founders and leadership team.
   
   
 * Our customers love Softr (1M+ users and growing)! A daily dose of customer love and positive feedback that rewards your work.
   
   
 * Backed by the best - we are well-resourced, profitable, and backed by best investors, like FirstMark Capital and the world’s best angel investors like Gokul Rajaram, Scott Belsky, Brian Balfour, Cristina Cordova and more (check out the full list here).

title: Social Media Manager
description:
We’re hiring: Social Media & Content Manager (Hamburg) | €65K | German fluency required




Soda has partnered with a mission-driven digital gaming company that’s redefining how people win dream prizes — while supporting real charitable causes.




They are now on the hunt for a Social Media & Content Manager to grow our organic social channels, shape our brand voice, and bring our story to life across platforms. You’ll work closely with brand, creative, and performance teams — and you won’t just stay behind the camera 👀




We’re looking for someone who’s excited to be front and center too!




**Fluent German Required!**



What you’ll do:

 * Develop content plans aligned with paid campaigns
 * Create fun, engaging content around homes, winners, raffles & behind-the-scenes
 * Collaborate with creators & influencers — from micro to national
 * Build and manage creator relationships
 * Be the voice of our community — in DMs, comments, and beyond
 * Monitor, track, and report on content performance
 * Maintain strong visual brand consistency




What you bring:

 * Strong feel for trends, sounds, memes, and formats
 * Confident creating content and showing up on camera
 * Experience with influencer marketing & content calendars
 * Tools like Canva, CapCut or mobile editors are second nature
 * Aesthetic eye & strong storytelling instincts







This is a full-time, in-house role based in Hamburg with a salary of €65K. You'll be joining a team that's building something joyful, fast-moving, and genuinely exciting.







Ready to make some content magic? Apply now!

title: Online Marketing Manager (m/f/d)
description:
We are looking for you as Online Marketing Manager (m/f/d) at our headquarters in Augsburg.

Hosokawa Alpine is internationally renowned for high-quality, durable machines and systems. We are among the world leaders in mechanical process engineering and film extrusion. With over 125 years of experience, we offer efficient solutions for numerous industries. Whether complex films or the finest powders in areas such as pharmaceuticals, chemicals, food, or recycling – we are a full-service provider across all process steps. With around 840 employees, we focus on sustainable technologies made in Germany and guarantee the highest level of customer satisfaction. Global presence, future orientation, flat hierarchies, and exciting tasks in special machine construction characterize our company.

Your Tasks


 * Continuous analysis and optimization of the company website regarding SEO, usability (GUI), customer journey, and technical functionalities
 * Management and optimization of interfaces with CRM systems, mailing tools, and other online platforms
 * Creation, maintenance, and adaptation of content for the corporate website
 * Ensuring target group–oriented and brand-compliant online communication
 * Supporting the implementation of new digital tools as well as in the strategic development and expansion of online activities and campaigns
 * Managing and coordinating external service providers (e.g., web agencies, SEO/SEA agencies, tool specialists)
 * Collaboration with internal departments (e.g., sales, product management, design) to ensure consistency of communication activities
   
   

All this appeals to you and you are interested in becoming a part of our company? Don't wait any longer and send us your application now.

Your Profile


 * Degree in online marketing, digital media, communication, or comparable training with relevant professional experience
 * Extensive experience in website support and optimization as well as project and campaign management
 * Very good knowledge of online analysis tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Matomo), SEO tools, and CMS systems
 * An affinity for digital trends and innovations is required
 * Strong communication and consulting skills
 * Independent, structured, and results-oriented approach to work
 * Fluent German and good English skills
   
   

What We Offer You


 * Attractive conditions in accordance with the collective agreement of the Bavarian metal and electrical industry
 * Appreciative working environment with open communication
 * Modern staff canteen subsidized by the employer
 * Flexible working time models
 * Generous opportunities for remote work
 * Resources for individual development at our Alpine Campus
 * Company pension scheme and subsidized retirement benefits
 * Parking spaces and good connections to public transport
 * Corporate benefits
   
   

Sounds interesting? Apply online using our online application form.

We look forward to speaking to you soon!

Your Contact

Walter Mader, +49 821 5906 – 970

title: Manager Digital Marketing Activation (M/F/D) - Football
description:
Adidas is an equal opportunity employer and we are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace. We welcome applications from people of all ages, genders (incl. gender identity), ethnic and social backgrounds, nationalities, sexual orientations, religions and beliefs, and those with apparent or non-apparent disabilities*. We do not tolerate harassment or discrimination toward any of our applicants or employees.


 * We actively encourage individuals with disabilities to apply and will provide reasonable accommodations throughout the recruitment process.
   
   

Team: Digital Activation Sports Performance

PURPOSEAs a Manager Digital Activation at adidas, you are responsible for planning and executing impactful digital marketing campaigns and activation projects across adidas’ global digital ecosystem and consumer touchpoints. Your role is to orchestrate the successful delivery of seamless, consumer-centric digital experiences that align with business, brand, and digital objectives, drive operational excellence, and meet delivery timelines. In this position, you will collaborate closely with Business Units (BUs), market teams, internal and external agencies, and cross-functional partners in digital marketing planning, consumer engagement, experience design, digital product, and analytics. Together, you will bring campaigns and projects to life across all adidas digital touchpoints. Additionally, you will define clear briefs and requirements for all relevant stakeholders, ensuring every initiative delivers on strategic objectives, brand positioning, and consumer expectations.

Key Responsibilities

Scope: Accountable for the planning and execution of selected global digital campaigns and activation projects


 * Planning & Execution
 * Orchestrate end-to-end planning and execution of digital campaigns and seasonal projects for the Business Units and markets across all stakeholders, including initial briefing, creative and technical development, implementation and localization. Ensure quality through user testing, QA, and post-launch A/B testing and optimization.
 * Collaborate with Digital Analytics and Consumer Experience teams to leverage consumer insights and commercial drivers for consumer-centric digital planning and execution.
 * Coordinate cross-functional digital teams in Digital, BUs, Global Brands, markets, external agencies and Digital Product towards delivery to meet the expected quality and timelines.
 * Solve delivery issues on time. Safeguard the delivery of critical scope items throughout the season.
 * Identify needs for new digital capabilities in your area of responsibility. Partner with Digital Product Owners to capture requirements into the corresponding product backlogs.
 * Monitoring & Success Measurement
 * Ensure delivery meets the brief and agreed scope.
 * Monitor defined success KPIs and optimize implementations and future planning based on performance insights.
 * Optimization
 * Create strong collaboration with stakeholders of the BUs, Digital and markets within your area of responsibility, contributing to best practices for digital experience planning and production and continuously improving the execution process.
 * Optimize planning and execution based on performance results and consumer insights.
 * Contribute to the development of digital tools and frameworks in close collaboration with Digital Product Owners.
 * Communication
 * Provide continuous transparency on campaign and project status along the season to stakeholders within your scope of responsibility.
   
   

KEY RELATIONSHIPS


 * Global Digital and E-commerce organization
 * Global Brand organization, including Business Units (BUs) and Communications
 * Market teams
 * Internal and external agencies
 * Digital Marketing Planning & Operations
 * Experience Design and Ecosystem teams
 * Membership
 * Digital Analytics
 * Digital Product teams
 * Group Functions
   
   

Requirements


 * Education & Professional Experience
 * Degree with focus on Business, Marketing, Digital, E-commerce, Communication or related areas, or equivalent combination of education and experience
 * 4+ years of professional experience in digital marketing, e-commerce, or a related field
 * Experience in (digital) campaign planning, delivery and management
 * Experience collaborating with stakeholders and experts across various seniority levels
 * Experience in working with internal and external agencies and partners
 * Experience in (digital) project management is a plus
 * Familiarity with the adidas global Brand Marketing organization is a plus
 * Soft-Skills
 * Excellent communication skills; comfortable presenting to stakeholders at all organizational levels, both in person and remotely
 * Strong collaboration and organizational skills
 * High resilience and solution-oriented attitude
 * Ability to navigate ambiguity and untangle complex challenges into actionable activities
 * Hard-Skills
 * Knowledge of creative and technical aspects of digital and mobile platforms
 * Experience with digital content delivery needs, workflows, and marketing processes
 * Affinity for and foundational experience in leveraging performance analytics and consumer insights to enhance campaign effectiveness
 * Comfortable working with emerging digital platforms and technologies
 * Familiarity with digital products and capabilities is a plus
 * Fluent in English, both written and verbal
   
   

adidas celebrates diversity, supports inclusiveness and encourages individual expression in our workplace. We do not tolerate the harassment or discrimination toward any of our applicants or employees. We are an equal opportunity employer.

title: Marketing Manager - ERP & Digital Solutions
description:
Muller Solutions is a leading technology consulting firm specializing in ERP, digital transformation, outsourcing, and managed services. We partner with forward-thinking organizations to help them work smarter, scale faster, and stay ahead in today's fast-paced digital world.

💥 The Opportunity

Are you a strategic marketer who knows how to position complex IT solutions, build a brand people trust, and generate leads that convert? We're looking for an experienced Marketing Manager to own and execute our entire marketing strategy for our ERP & Digital Solutions portfolio — and make a real impact.

Requirements

✨ What You'll Do

As our Marketing Manager, you'll wear many hats — strategist, storyteller, digital wizard, and growth driver. You'll be responsible for:

✅ Branding: Shape and amplify our brand identity for ERP and digital solutions, ensuring we're recognized as a trusted partner in the market.

✅ SEO: Develop and implement SEO strategies to maximize search visibility and organic traffic.

✅ Content Marketing: Build and manage a robust content plan — including blogs, whitepapers, case studies, and thought leadership — to fuel SEO and lead generation.

✅ Lead Generation: Design and run creative multi-channel campaigns that attract, nurture, and convert qualified leads for our sales team.

✅ Social Media Management: Manage and grow our social media presence, fostering engagement and building a loyal community.

✅ Media Buying: Plan, negotiate, and execute media buys (PPC, digital ads, sponsorships) to expand reach and maximize ROI.

✅ Events & Webinars: Plan and host webinars, virtual sessions, and industry events to engage prospects and position us as thought leaders.

✅ Partner & Channel Marketing: Collaborate with technology partners (e.g., SAP) on joint marketing campaigns, leveraging available co-marketing funds.

✅ Marketing Automation & CRM: Build and manage lead nurturing workflows, ensuring strong alignment with sales and visibility across the funnel.

✅ PR & Thought Leadership: Develop PR strategies, craft press releases, and secure media coverage. Build thought leadership content that positions Muller Solutions as an expert in ERP, outsourcing, and digital transformation.

✅ Marketing Analytics & Reporting: Track, measure, and report on all marketing activities to ensure continuous improvement and clear ROI.

Who You Are

✔️ Proven experience in B2B marketing within the IT industry — ideally ERP (e.g., SAP), their partners, or outsourcing & managed services.

✔️ Deep understanding of branding and positioning for complex tech solutions.

✔️ Strong expertise in SEO, lead generation, content marketing, and paid media campaigns.

✔️ Hands-on experience with social media management and marketing automation tools.

✔️ Skilled in planning and hosting webinars or industry events.

✔️ Experience in PR campaigns and building thought leadership.

✔️ Data-driven, collaborative, and able to thrive in a fast-paced, growing environment.

Benefits

💎 Why You'll Love Working With Us

✨ Be part of a dynamic team making a real impact in digital transformation.

✨ Work with leading partners and innovative clients.

✨ Bring your ideas to life and own initiatives from concept to results.

✨ Competitive salary, growth opportunities, and a supportive, flexible work culture.

title: Junior Online Marketing Manager 100% (m/w/d)
description:
Du bist zahlenaffin, hast erste Erfahrungen im Online-Marketing und E-Commerce gesammelt und bist bereit, die Performance unserer Kampagnen auf ein neues Level zu katapultieren? Dann werde unser neuer (Junior) Online Marketing Manager (m/w/d) und werde Teil unseres dynamischen, schnell wachsenden Teams!


Als Online-Shop gestartet, wachsen wir stetig und sind mittlerweile nicht nur in den größten Drogerieketten und dem Lebensmitteleinzelhandel, sondern auch im europäischen Raum vertreten. Unser Ziel: SHEKO sowohl online als auch offline weiter auszubauen. Sei Teil unserer Mission und hilf uns, die Kategorie Weight Wellbeing attraktiver und ein wenig bunter zu gestalten.


Aufgaben

   
   
 * Du unterstützt bei der Planung und Durchführung von Kampagnen auf Plattformen wie Meta und Native.
   
   
 * Du hilfst bei der Analyse von Kampagnendaten und der Erstellung von Reports.
   
   
 * Du arbeitest an der Optimierung der Media Buying Prozesse.
   
   
 * Du unterstützt bei der Auswertung und Überwachung von KPIs wie Conversion Rates und ROAS.
   
   
 * Du hilfst bei der Durchführung von A/B-Tests zur Kampagnenoptimierung.
   
   
 * Du trägst zur Analyse von Kundenverhalten und der Ableitung von Optimierungsmaßnahmen bei.
   
   
 * Du unterstützt bei der Analyse von Budgetauswertungen und Kampagnenperformance.
   
   


Qualifikation

   
   
 * Du hast ein Studium oder eine kaufmännische Ausbildung erfolgreich abgeschlossen.
   
   
 * Du hast idealerweise bereits 1-2 Jahre Berufserfahrungen im E-Commerce oder Online Marketing gesammelt.
   
   
 * Erfahrungen mit Plattformen wie Meta und Native sind von Vorteil.
   
   
 * Du kennst die wichtigsten Marketing-Kennzahlen (KPIs) und kannst sie zur Analyse und Optimierung einsetzen.
   
   
 * Du verfügst über ein gutes Zahlenverständnis und bist analytisch stark.
   
   
 * Du arbeitest selbstständig, bist gut organisiert und verfolgst eine zielorientierte Arbeitsweise.
   
   
 * Du sprichst fließend Deutsch.
   
   


Benefits


Arbeiten in einem besonderen Scale-Up mit dynamischem Wachstum, viel Potenzial und jeder Menge Spaß. Wir sind sehr stolz auf unser starkes Team und unseren enormen Zusammenhalt. Bei uns findest Du spannende und abwechslungsreiche Aufgaben und täglich neue Herausforderungen – garantiert keine Langeweile.


Ganz egal ob Jogginghose oder Dino-Kostüm - komm, wie Du Dich am wohlsten fühlst. Uns gegenseitig immer zu unterstützen ist für uns selbstverständlich, daher wirst Du Dich schnell als Teil der SHEKO Familie fühlen!


Diese Benefits findest Du bei uns natürlich auch:


   
   
 * Ein tolles Team mit Hands-On-Mentalität, das Dich mit offenen Armen empfängt
   
   
 * Ein modernes, zukunftsorientiertes Arbeitsumfeld mit Wohlfühlfaktor, einer offenen Feedback- Kultur und flachen Hierarchien
   
   
 * Viel Raum für Deine Ideen und dafür, Dein volles Potential zu entdecken und über Dich hinaus zu wachsen
   
   
 * Gemeinsam entwickeln wir Karriereziele, die zu Dir passen und helfen Dir, Dich fachlich und persönlich weiterzuentwickeln
   
   
 * Wasser, Tee, Shake und Kaffee-Flat
   
   
 * Zahlreiche Teambuilding-Events
   
   


Das hört sich gut an? Dann bewirb Dich mit Deinen aussagekräftigen Bewerbungsunterlagen (Lebenslauf und Motivationsschreiben) über unsere Website. Lass uns wissen, wer Du bist und was Dich bewegt!

title: Online Growth & Marketing Manager (all genders)
description:
We're looking for a part-time online marketing manager to optimize top-of-funnel growth through paid marketing channels & content. We're a product-led company, thus, this role is focused on the whole acquisition funnel and very KPI-driven.


You'll work closely with Valuecase's founders and external service providers (e.g. design agency). You can expect responsibility, quick decision making & openness for very creative marketing approaches. We are not a dusty B2B brand – we innovate through creative, positioning, and product.


We prefer hybrid work from Hamburg, but are also considering fully remote candidates. This is a full-time or part-time (~50-80%) role.


Tasks


Paid Acquisition


   
   
 * Launch, manage and optimize campaigns on Google Ads, LinkedIn, Meta, and others.
   
   
 * Coordinate external service providers and internal stakeholders for design / copy.
   
   
 * Continuously experiment with targeting, creatives, and landing pages.
   
   
 * Measure CAC, conversion rates, and ROI.
   
   


Content Marketing


   
   
 * You'll help us build and execute a strategy.
   
   


Website & Funnel Optimization


   
   
 * Define & lead key initiatives to improve the website.
   
   
 * Run & evaluate A/B tests on CTAs, forms, and signup flows.
   
   


Analytics & Reporting


   
   
 * Set up dashboards for acquisition, engagement, and retention metrics.
   
   
 * Report insights weekly or biweekly to drive decisions.
   
   


Requirements


Ideal Profile


   
   
 * Prior performance marketing experience (bonus if software)
   
   
 * Hands-on with tools such as HubSpot, Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4, LinkedIn Campaign Manager.
   
   
 * Comfortable writing or briefing for content & creatives.
   
   
 * Strong data mindset – knows how to run experiments, measure outcomes, and iterate.
   
   


Benefits

   
   
 * Regular team events and offsites, Lunch subsidies, Gym Membership discount, as well as free drinks and snacks
   
   
 * The latest and greatest tech hardware and tech tools
   
   
 * Competitive compensation package
   
   
 * Work side-by-side with the founding team and all other employees in an agile and collaborative manner
   
   


Why Valuecase


Small team, big leverage. Real responsibility from day one, direct access to founders, candid feedback, and a culture true to our values: driven, bold, collaborative, candid, authentic.


How to apply


   
   
 * Send your CV (and LinkedIn profile) plus 2–3 lines on why you’re excited to join.
   
   
 * Start: flexible, ideally within the next 1-2 months.
   
   


The typical process lasts about 3-4 hours comprising 3 interviews. If possible, at least one of the interviews will be conducted in person in Hamburg, Germany.

title: Online Marketing Manager Multi-Traffic (m/f/d) - freelance & remote
description:
Your Team

You’ll be joining a small, international team passionate about Business Development, Account Management, and Marketing. We are experts in our fields, united by a commitment to excellence, transparency, and growth. Our flat hierarchies and collaborative environment foster innovation and ensure everyone’s voice is heard. We believe that great results come from working together, celebrating wins, and supporting one another.

Here, you’ll find a supportive and forward-thinking culture that offers plenty of room to grow professionally and personally. Join a team where we value not only your expertise but also the energy and ideas you bring to the table.

Role And Responsibilities

We’re looking for an experienced Multi-traffic Manager to create and optimize marketing campaigns across multiple traffic sources. This role is ideal for a data-driven, creative strategist who understands how drive performance. In this role you will:


 * Develop and execute multi-channel marketing strategies for multitraffic channels.
 * Manage advertising budgets across platforms like Meta (Facebook/Instagram), Taboola, Outbrain, TikTok, and networks.
 * Analyze and optimize traffic campaigns for ROI, CPA, RPM, and other key metrics.
 * Identify new traffic sources and test innovative approaches to scale acquisition.
 * Collaborate with Paid Search, Content and Product teams to align campaigns with brand objectives.
 * Create regular performance reports and deliver actionable insights to leadership.
   
   

Requirements


 * 3–5+ years of experience managing multi-channel digital marketing campaigns.
 * Strong understanding of different traffic acquisition strategies.
 * Proficiency with analytics platforms.
 * Excellent communication and project management skills.
 * Fluent in English
 * A/B testing and conversion rate optimization experience preferred.
   
   

Why Compado?

By joining our team, you’ll have the chance to make a tangible impact on the success of our company and the growth of our clients. You’ll be mentored by our senior experts and you'll gain exposure to diverse industries and innovative projects, all while being part of a supportive, inspiring team that believes in your potential. Together, we strive for excellence, celebrate milestones, and ensure every day brings exciting new opportunities.

Contact Information

Ready to grow with us? We are looking forward to your application!

About Us

Compado is a B2B tech platform for contextual advertising and content monetization. Founded in 2016, the platform provides cookie-free contextual advertising to consumer brands and cookie-free content monetization to publishers. The platform’s proprietary contextual advertising puts brands in front of shoppers - and helps publishers to monetize their content through contextually targeted brand recommendations.

We have decided that traditional working is over. We went fully remote and are spearheading the remote working movement within Berlin’s start-up scene. With us, you can work from anywhere. If you are eager to be a part of phenomenal growth and trust we can shape one of Berlin’s fastest-growing ventures together in an impactful way, we are very excited to receive your application.

title: Online Marketing Manager
description:
Bist du bereit, in einem jungen und dynamischen Umfeld als Online Marketing Manager durchzustarten? Bei Estateanfrage, einer der am schnellsten wachsenden Vertriebs- und Marketingagenturen in der Immobilienbranche, bieten wir dir die Chance, deine Karriere auf das nächste Level zu heben – mit oder Vorerfahrung! Wir suchen nach begeisterten Talenten, die mit uns gemeinsam den Immobilienmarkt revolutionieren wollen. Du wirst Teil eines ambitionierten Teams, das Exzellenz lebt und schnelles Wachstum anstrebt. Wenn du Drive, Lernbereitschaft und eine Vorliebe für herausragende Leistung mitbringst, dann bist du bei uns genau richtig. Lass uns gemeinsam dafür sorgen, dass unsere Partner die besten Investoren für ihre Projekte finden und damit ihren Erfolg sicherstellen. Werde Teil unserer Mission und erlebe, wie sich harte Arbeit auszahlt!


Aufgaben

   
   
 * Entwicklung und Implementierung von Online-Marketing-Strategien zur Unterstützung unserer Immobilienprojekte.
   
   
 * Verwaltung und Optimierung von digitalen Werbekampagnen auf Plattformen wie Meta Ads und Social Media.
   
   
 * Designerstellung von Creatives, schreiben von Werbetexten und das Aufbauen von Projektwebseiten
   
   
 * Analyse von Marketingdaten und Erstellung von Berichten zur Bewertung der Kampagnenleistung.
   
   
 * Kontinuierliche Beobachtung der Markttrends und Anpassung der Marketingstrategien entsprechend.
   
   


Qualifikation

   
   
 * Begeisterung für den Bereich Marketing
   
   
 * Basic Kenntnisse im Bereich Landingpages, Meta oder Canva
   
   
 * Kreatives Denken
   
   
 * Teamplayer mit ausgeprägten Kommunikationsfähigkeiten.
   
   
 * Eigenverantwortliche und zielorientierte Arbeitsweise.
   
   


Benefits


- klarer Karriereweg und Aufstiegschancen


- junges und dynamisches Team (Durschnittsalter 23 Jahre)


- regelmäßige Teamabende und Teamevents zu den schönsten Orten der Welt (Toskana, Monaco oder Dubai)


- kreatives und produktives Arbeiten in klimatisierten und modernen Büroräumen (Bavaria Towers)


- neuste MacBooks und technisches Equipment


- Wellpass zur Förderung der mentalen und psychischen Leistungsfähigkeit


- eigener RedBull Kühlschrank


Mach Karriere bei Estateanfrage als Online Marketing Manager! Sei Teil eines dynamischen, wachstumsorientierten Teams und gestalte die Zukunft der Immobilienbranche mit. Bewirb dich jetzt!
sector: Real Estate and Equipment Rental Services

title: Social Media Manager (m/w/d)
description:
Du bist auf TikTok zuhause, hast kreative Ideen im Kopf und Lust, Trends zu setzen statt ihnen nur zu folgen? In unserem Team arbeitest du an innovativen Videokonzepten, managst Social-Media-Accounts und entwickelst Content, der begeistert. Wenn du Spaß daran hast, gemeinsam mit dem Kreativteam frische Ideen zu gestalten und Kund:innen glücklich zu machen, bist du hier genau richtig!


Aufgaben


Videokonzeptentwicklung:


   
   
 * Trendscouting auf TikTok & Co. – du bist immer up to date
   
   
 * Entwicklung kreativer & innovativer Ideen, die begeistern
   
   
 * Enge Abstimmung mit dem Creative Director für kreative Konzepte
   
   


Account Management:


   
   
 * Direkter Draht zu unseren Kunden – du verstehst ihre Visionen und setzt sie um
   
   
 * Eigenständige Betreuung und Steuerung von Social-Media-Accounts
   
   
 * Community Management & redaktionelle Verantwortung für maximale Reichweite
   
   
 * Kunden begeistern – durch professionelle Zusammenarbeit
   
   


Kreative Zusammenarbeit:


   
   
 * Enger Austausch mit dem gesamten Kreativteam
   
   
 * Mitgestaltung in kreativen Brainstormings und Team-Meetings
   
   
 * Gemeinsam zum Ziel – konstruktiv, motiviert und ergebnisorientiert
   
   


Qualifikation


Fachliche Qualifikation:


   
   
 * Studium oder Ausbildung in Medien, Kommunikation, Marketing oder vergleichbare Qualifikation
   
   
 * Nachweisbare Erfahrung in der Entwicklung von Social-Media-Content, insbesondere auf TikTok
   
   


Kreative Skills:


   
   
 * Kreativer Kopf mit einem Gespür für Trends und innovative Ideen
   
   
 * Talent, visuelle Konzepte zu entwickeln und in fesselnde Videos zu verwandeln
   
   


Technisches Know-how:


   
   
 * Tiefes Verständnis der TikTok-Plattform und ihrer Features
   
   
 * Erfahrung im Umgang mit Videobearbeitungs-Software und Grafik-Tools
   
   


Teamplayer mit Kommunikationsstärke:


   
   
 * Du bist ein echter Teamplayer und arbeitest gerne eng mit anderen zusammen
   
   
 * Ausgezeichnete kommunikative Fähigkeiten zur Abstimmung von Ideen und Konzepten
   
   


Organisation & Eigenverantwortung:


   
   
 * Selbstständige Projektsteuerung ist für dich kein Problem
   
   
 * Strukturierte Arbeitsweise und Organisationstalent sind deine Stärken
   
   


Leidenschaft für Social Media:


   
   
 * Social Media ist dein Zuhause, du kennst die neuesten Trends und Entwicklungen
   
   
 * TikTok begeistert dich & du verstehst, was die Zielgruppe wirklich will
   
   


Benefits


• Cooles Office mitten in Berlin


• Als Arbeitshandy bekommst du ein iPhone


• Eigenes MacBook


• Unterwegs für Kund:innen


• Flexibles Arbeiten


• Home Office / Remote


Du wärst der perfekte Zuwachs für unser Social Media Team in Berlin! Hier hat eine junge und mega motivierte Crew spannende Aufgaben und Projekte am Start. Bei uns wird nicht nur mitgemacht, sondern werden aktiv die Trends mitgestaltet. Und keine Sorge, veraltete Arbeitstechnologien? Nee, bei uns bekommst du immer den neuesten Stuff. Bock auf 'nen Job in einem echt innovativen Umfeld? Dann bist du bei uns genau richtig. :-)

title: Influencer Marketing Manager (Remote – Europe)
description:
Location: Fully remote - open to candidates based in Europe

Nas Company is an ecosystem of products that help people feel more connected.

Both online and offline. In the millions.

We are a team of 100 people from 28 countries who are market leaders in the creator economy, reaching 300 Million people globally every month.

Nas Company has 5 main products:

Education: Nas Academy

Technology: Nas.io

Media: Nas Daily (65 Million followers!)

Events: Nas Summit

Hotels: Nas House

We're looking for a creative and strategic Influencer Marketing Manager to lead our creator partnerships and digital campaigns across Europe. This role is perfect for someone who lives and breathes content, understands what makes videos go viral, and knows how to turn collaborations into real impact.

What you'll do:


 * Plan and execute influencer marketing campaigns with top creators across multiple platforms (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, etc.)
 * Manage and grow relationships with influencers, creators, and partners
 * Coordinate webinars, live sessions, and digital events that engage our audience and drive conversions
 * Collaborate with the content and design teams to create high-performing landing pages and promotional materials
 * Analyze performance metrics, optimize campaigns, and report on key results
   
   

What we're looking for:


 * 3+ years of experience in influencer marketing, social media, or content partnerships
 * Deep understanding of content trends and what makes people share, click, and engage
 * Strong communication and negotiation skills
 * Data-driven mindset with creative intuition
 * Self-starter who thrives in a remote, fast-paced environment

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Key Responsibilities

JOB DESCRIPTION


 * Develop and manage a global social media calendar that aligns with product launches, campaigns, events, and community moments and connects simulation racing fans of all levels.
 * Create, edit, and publish engaging social content around Fanatec products, promotions, partners, live events, and sim racing culture, including short form videos, graphics, and posts - across all major platforms.
 * Lead day-to-day community engagement across relevant social media platforms responding to fans, creators, and partners to build strong consumer relationships and brand loyalty.
 * Collaborate with internal teams (Marketing, Creative, Product, Sales) to ensure consistent messaging and campaign execution.
 * Drive Fanatec’s social media innovation by leveraging data and analytics to refine content strategies for continuous improvement and alignment with business objectives.
 * Stay ahead of platform updates, algorithm changes, and emerging trends to keep Fanatec at the forefront of social innovation.
 * Coordinate with agency partners and external collaborators as needed.
   
   

Education And Experience


 * 3+ years of experience in social media management, community building, content creation, or a related role, ideally in gaming, esports, racing or tech.
 * Fluency in English and German (written and spoken) is required.
 * Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent experience) in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field preferred.
 * Based in or willing to relocate to Landshut, Germany or Munich
   
   

Skills And Competencies


 * Deep understanding of social media platforms, including content formats, trends, and algorithmic behaviors.
 * Strong analytical skills to evaluate social media performance, audience behavior, and platform insights.
 * Passion for sim racing, gaming, and motorsports—you know the culture and speak the language.
 * Hands-On experience in content creation, including video editing, photo editing, graphic design or related skills.
 * Excellent communication and collaboration skills across teams and time zones.
 * Ability to build relationships and work collaboratively across departments.
 * Experience working with agencies or external creators is a plus.
 * Willingness to travel occasionally (up to 20%) and work with international teams

title: Social Media Manager
description:
About Us

We’re building a community-first brand in the world of iGaming, sports betting, and casino entertainment. We're not just another operator—we're rethinking how players engage with platforms across social and community channels. From bold ideas to banter-worthy tweets, our voice matters. And we want yours to be part of it.

🎯 The Role

We’re on the hunt for a Social Media Manager who lives and breathes sports, understands the online gambling space, and knows what it means to create thumb-stopping content. You’ll be the voice of our brand across Twitter, Reddit, Discord, and Telegram etc, shaping how our community interacts with the brand every day.

🧠 What You Bring


 * Strong sports & sports betting knowledge – you know the game, the odds, and the culture around it.
 * Familiarity with gambling & casino games – you're already plugged into the world our players love.
 * Bonus: Experience or understanding of crypto and how it intersects with online communities.
 * Creative mindset – full of ideas for posts, memes, campaigns, and community engagement strategies.
 * Platform fluency – especially Twitter, but also Reddit, Discord, and Telegram. You know what works where, and why.
 * Player-first mentality – you treat the community with respect and authenticity and know how to speak their language.
 * Collaborative approach – you're comfortable sketching out content ideas, giving direction to designers, and working across teams.
   
   

🛠️ What You'll Do


 * Own and execute our social media strategy, primarily on Twitter but also across other key platforms.
 * Engage with players in real-time, building community trust and loyalty.
 * Work closely with designers and content teams to bring your creative ideas to life.
 * Monitor trends, memes, and moments in the sports betting and crypto world – and jump on them fast.
 * Drive organic reach, player engagement, and brand visibility.
   
   

✅ Why Work with us?


 * Flexible hours & competitive salaries
 * Office in Kurfürstendamm, with a private rooftop terrace and city views
 * Healthcare & pension contributions
 * Free gym pass – keep your mind and body in top shape
 * Work that has real impact with thousands of players
 * Join a creative, ambitious team that values bold ideas and ownership
   
   

📍 Important

Applicants must be based in Berlin and available for on-site work at our Kurfürstendamm office.

Apply now and help us bring fresh energy, creativity, and authenticity to our players across the globe. Let's build something great—together.

title: Social Media Manager (all genders)
description:
Wir sind Forvis Mazars und du findest uns in mehr als 100 Ländern, weil wir aus Audit, Tax und Advisory weltweit nicht wegzudenken sind. Als integrierte Partnerschaft mit über 40.000 Professionals, davon mehr als 2.700 an 13 deutschen Standorten, gehören wir zu den führenden Prüfungs- und Beratungsgesellschaften und setzen unsere Stärken für Unternehmen jeder Größe ein.

Das erwartet Dich


 * Du übernimmst die Entwicklung und Umsetzung der LinkedIn-Strategie mit dem klaren Fokus auf den Ausbau des Personal Brandings unserer Führungskräfte.
 * Als Sparringspartner*in für das Leadership Team berätst du aktiv bei der strategischen und konzeptionellen Positionierung (u. a. zu Themenfindung, Storytelling und Tonalität).
 * Du konzipierst, steuerst und baust ein Employee-Advocacy-Programm auf (inkl. Coachings, Guidelines und Content-Support), um unsere Mitarbeitenden erfolgreich als authentische Markenbotschafter*innen zu etablieren.
 * Du verantwortest die Themen-, Redaktions- und Kampagnenplanung für unseren Corporate-Kanal und stimmst dich eng mit den Bereichen Kommunikation und Marketing ab.
 * Die Beratung und das Coaching unserer Führungskräfte bei der Content-Erstellung liegen in deiner Hand. Zudem koordinierst du die Content-Produktion (Text, Grafik, Video oder Live-Formate).
 * Du übernimmst das Monitoring, Reporting und die Analyse aller relevanten KPIs (Reichweite, Engagement, Leads), erkennst frühzeitig neue Social Media-Trends und leitest Optimierungsmaßnahmen ab.
   
   

Das bringst Du mit


 * Abgeschlossenes Studium in Marketing, Kommunikation, Journalismus oder einem vergleichbaren Bereich
 * Mindestens 4–5 Jahre Berufserfahrung im Bereich Social Media, Executive Communication oder Personal Branding, idealerweise im B2B- oder Professional Services-Umfeld
 * Fundierte Kenntnisse in Content-Marketing, Storytelling, Social Media KPIs und im Umgang mit LinkedIn Ads (Targeting, Kampagnen) sowie relevanten Tools (u. a. Sprinklr)
 * Nachweisbare Erfolge bei der Positionierung von Führungskräften auf LinkedIn bzw. Erfahrung in der Zusammenarbeit mit C-Level (z. B. Beratung, Ghostwriting)
 * Souveränes Auftreten und diplomatisches Geschick, gepaart mit einem feinen Gespür für sensible Themen und der Tonalität in einer regulierten Branche
 * Sehr gute kommunikative Fähigkeiten in Deutsch und Englisch (Wort und Schrift) sowie Basiskenntnisse im Rahmen der Nutzung von KI-Tools
   
   

Darum Forvis Mazars


 * Lass dich fördern – Zahlreiche Entwicklungsprogramme und Trainingsangebote auf unserer globalen Lernplattform, darunter individuelle Lernpfade, Grundlagenschulungen und Offsites für deine persönliche und fachliche Entwicklung
 * Wir investieren in dich – Finanzielle Förderung von Berufsexamina sowie weiteren berufsrelevanten Qualifizierungen
 * Auf zu neuen Horizonten – Perspektivwechsel durch einen Auslandsaufenthalt oder Möglichkeit der Mitwirkung bei übergreifenden Projekten in Bereichen wie Innovation und Nachhaltigkeit
 * Wir bleiben in Bewegung – Ob mit dem BusinessBike ins Office oder beim After-Work-Fitness dank der Flatrate von Urban Sports Club
 * Dein Wellbeing ist uns wichtig – Individuelle Coachings, Teamworkshops sowie Zugang zu kostenlosen, anonymen Beratungsangeboten bei beruflichen oder privaten Herausforderungen für dich und deine Angehörigen
 * Deine Zeit zählt – Mobiles Arbeiten, 30 Tage Urlaub sowie bezuschusste Wertkonten für eine flexible Arbeitszeitgestaltung (z.B. Sabbatical)
   
   

Für die Bearbeitung von Bewerbungen nutzt Forvis Mazars die Plattform Greenhouse Software, Inc. Nähere Informationen zur Datenverarbeitung und -speicherung findest du in unserer Datenschutzerklärung.

title: Online Marketing Manager (m/w/d)
description:
Wir suchen zum nächstmöglichen Zeitpunkt einen Online Marketing Manager (m/w/d) in Vollzeit für unseren Standort in Köln.


Aufgaben

   
   
 * Beratung & operative Betreuung unserer Kunden im Bereich Paid Advertising und ggf. weiteren Online Marketing Kanälen
   
   
 * Planung, Strategieentwicklung und Durchführung von Werbemaßnahmen für uns und unsere Kunden
   
   
 * Eigenständige Organisation und Verantwortung für deine Projekte und Kunden
   
   
 * Datenanalyse mittels verschiedener Tools aus Google Ads, Google Analytics, Meta Ads etc.
   
   
 * Proaktives und selbstständiges Erkennen von Potenzialen und Lösen von Problemstellungen
   
   
 * Marktbeobachtungen und Analysen (Trends, Plattformen, Werbeformen, Prozesse und Wettbewerb)
   
   
 * Unterstützung des Teams beim Erreichen unserer Unternehmensziele
   
   


Qualifikation

   
   
 * Du hast gute Online Marketing Kenntnisse
   
   
 * Du besitzt die Fähigkeit zum verlässlichen, selbständigen Arbeiten und willst aktiv Verantwortung übernehmen
   
   
 * Du besitzt einen guten Umgang mit Zahlen und die Fähigkeit, richtige Entscheidungen daraus abzuleiten
   
   
 * Du bist sehr internetaffin, flink am Rechner und schaust gerne über den Tellerrand hinaus
   
   
 * Du hast Spaß an der engen Zusammenarbeit & Kommunikation mit deinen Kunden
   
   
 * Du verfügst über Begeisterungsfähigkeit, Teamgeist und hast Lust, Neues zu lernen
   
   


Benefits

   
   
 * Flexible Arbeitszeiten: Gestalte deinen Arbeitstag so, dass er zu deinem Lebensrhythmus passt, mit Vertrauensarbeitszeit und Gleitzeit.
   
   
 * Urban Sports Club Mitgliedschaft: Bleibe aktiv und fit mit Zugang zu unzähligen Sport- und Wellnessangeboten.
   
   
 * Deutschland Ticket: Nutze öffentliche Verkehrsmittel bundesweit, flexibel und umweltfreundlich.
   
   
 * Moderne Ausstattung: Wir bieten dir die neueste Technologie, ergonomische Arbeitsplätze und eine produktive Arbeitsumgebung.

title: Junior Digital Marketing Manager (m/w/d) bei Grimms Hotels
description:
Grimms Hotels ist mehr als eine Hotelkette – wir verbinden stilvolles Design mit märchenhaften Erlebniswelten. Damit unsere digitalen Kanäle genauso glänzen wie unsere Häuser, suchen wir ab sofort einen kreativen und technisch versierten Junior Digital Marketing Manager, der unsere Social Media Präsenz mit Leidenschaft weiterentwickelt und sich auch vor Themen wie Websitepflege und SEO-Optimierung nicht scheut.


Aufgaben


Deine Mission:


Social Media Management


   
   
 * Kontinuierliche Betreuung unserer Social Media Profile (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn etc.)
   
   
 * Planung, Erstellung und Veröffentlichung von kreativem Content und Kampagnen in Zusammenarbeit mit unserem Kreativteam
   
   
 * Community Management: Interaktion mit unserer Community, Beantwortung von Kommentaren und Nachrichten
   
   
 * Beobachtung von Trends und Umsetzung innovativer Ideen zur Steigerung von Reichweite und Engagement
   
   


Websitepflege & -optimierung


   
   
 * Support bei der Pflege und Weiterentwicklung unserer WordPress-Websites
   
   


Support bei SEO & Backlinkstrategie


   
   
 * Umsetzung von On-Page- und Off-Page-SEO-Maßnahmen
   
   
 * Erstellung, Optimierung und Auswertung von Google Ads / SEA-Kampagnen
   
   
 * Aufbau und Pflege eines nachhaltigen Backlinkprofils
   
   


Qualifikation


Was du mitbringst:


   
   
 * Abgeschlossenes Studium im Bereich Marketing, Medien, Kommunikation oder eine fundierte Ausbildung mit entsprechender Berufserfahrung
   
   
 * Social Media ist dein Zuhause – du hast Gespür für Trends, Sprache und Storytelling
   
   
 * Du fühlst dich auch vor der Kamera wohl und bringst Ideen für Reels, Stories & Co. mit
   
   
 * Sicherer Umgang mit Tools wie Canva, KI Tools, Adobe Suite
   
   
 * Erfahrung mit Meta Ads und Meta Business Suite, optional: Google Ads, Google Analytics
   
   
 * Tiefes Verständnis im Aufbau und Pflege von Wordpress-Seiten
   
   
 * Gutes technisches Verständnis (HTML, Permalinks, Metabeschreibungen, Alt-Texte usw.)
   
   
 * Strukturierte, selbstständige Arbeitsweise mit hoher Eigenverantwortung
   
   
 * Kreativität, Zuverlässigkeit und Leidenschaft für digitale Kommunikation
   
   
 * Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift sowie sichere Englischkenntnisse
   
   


Benefits


Was dich bei uns erwartet:


   
   
 * Ein wertschätzendes, kollegiales Umfeld mit echter Teamkultur
   
   
 * Ein inspirierendes Umfeld in unseren Designhotels
   
   
 * Regelmäßiger Austausch, Weiterentwicklung und kreative Freiräume für deine persönliche Entfaltung
   
   
 * BVG Monatsticket
   
   
 * Mitarbeiterrabatte in Hotels deutschlandweit
   
   
 * Und nicht zuletzt: ein Arbeitsplatz, der so individuell ist wie du – mit einer Prise Märchenmagie
   
   


Wenn du Lust hast, ein wachsendes Hotelunternehmen mitzugestalten und mit deiner Expertise unsere digitalen Kanäle nach vorne zu bringen, dann freuen wir uns auf deine aussagekräftige Bewerbung!
